nasb.text: The locusts came up over all the land of Egypt and settled in all the territory of Egypt; they were very numerous. There had never been so many locusts, nor would there be so many again.

esv.text: The locusts came up over all the land of Egypt and settled on the whole country of Egypt, such a dense swarm of locusts as had never been before, nor ever will be again.

cnv.text: 蝗蟲上到埃及全地來，停留在埃及全境。牠們非常眾多，以前沒有像這樣多的蝗蟲，以後也沒有。

ccb.text: 埃及到处都布满了蝗虫，数目之多实在是空前绝后。
